race.description: Temporary Fence And Barrier Hire Handicap
race.comment: THUNDEROUS (2) did a great job to score by 1.75 lengths over today's course and distance last start in a far better run. Has his share of ability and is hard to beat again in this suitable race. YEAH COPY (7) was prominent from the outset when fourth over 1400m at Gold Coast last time out. Will appreciate the drop in grade. Well placed and sure to run well. BATTLESPACE (3) has not appeared since he won over 1900m at Kilcoy on December 19. Sure to make his presence felt while fresh. MIDNIGHT MIRACLE (10) filled a minor placing when fresh from a spell two starts ago. Could not back that up last time when 6 lengths away in seventh over 1300m at Toowoomba. One of the chances based on her best recent efforts.
